translations.es: Mi hija mayor viene esta noche.
translations.de: Meine älteste Tochter kommt heute Abend.
translations.ru: Моя старшая дочь придет сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Minha filha mais velha vem hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Con gái lớn của tôi sẽ đến tối nay.
translations.nl: Mijn oudste dochter komt vanavond langs.
translations.uk: Моя старша донька прийде сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: A legidősebb lányom ma este jön.
translations.hi: मेरी बड़ी बेटी आज रात आ रही है.
translations.pl: Moja najstarsza córka przyjdzie dziś wieczorem.
translations.el: Η μεγαλύτερη κόρη μου έρχεται απόψε.
translations.nb: Min eldste datter kommer i kveld.
translations.id: Anak perempuan sulung saya datang malam ini.
translations.sv: Min äldsta dotter kommer i kväll.
translations.ro: Fiica mea cea mare vine diseară.
translations.cs: Moje nejstarší dcera přijde dnes večer.
translations.da: Min ældste datter kommer i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜、私の長女が来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular). Masculine form used before a vowel-initial feminine noun; agrees in number with the noun.
Feminine singular noun meaning ‘eldest daughter/child’. Head of the NP ‘Mon aînée’; subject of the verb.
Verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive here (‘comes by/visits’). Agrees with the subject ‘Mon aînée’.
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘soir’; masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement (‘this evening’).

translations.en: She’s the eldest of the family.
translations.es: Ella es la mayor de la familia.
translations.de: Sie ist die Älteste der Familie.
translations.pt: Ela é a mais velha da família.
translations.vi: Cô ấy là con gái cả của gia đình.
translations.nl: Zij is de oudste van de familie.
translations.hi: वह परिवार की सबसे बड़ी है.
translations.nb: Hun er den eldste i familien.
translations.id: Dia adalah anak sulung dalam keluarga.
translations.ro: Ea este cea mai mare din familie.
translations.da: Hun er den ældste i familien.
translations.ja: 彼女は家族の長女です。

tokens.explanation: Copular auxiliary ‘être’, present indicative 3rd person singular, with clitic ‘C’ (ce) attached; introduces the predicate.
Noun with elided definite article ‘l’ (here from ‘la’ before vowel). Feminine singular; predicate nominal.
Preposition marking a genitive/possessive relation (‘of the family’).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘famille’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘de’.

translations.es: Estoy hablando con mi hija mayor.
translations.it: Sto parlando con mia figlia maggiore.
translations.ru: Я разговариваю со своей старшей дочерью.
translations.pt: Estou falando com minha filha mais velha.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nói chuyện với con gái lớn của tôi.
translations.nl: Ik praat met mijn oudste dochter.
translations.uk: Я розмовляю зі своєю старшою донькою.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी बड़ी बेटी से बात कर रही हूँ.
translations.el: Μιλάω με τη μεγαλύτερη κόρη μου.
translations.nb: Jeg snakker med min eldste datter.
translations.id: Saya sedang berbicara dengan putri sulung saya.
translations.sv: Jag pratar med min äldsta dotter.
translations.ro: Vorbesc cu fiica mea cea mare.
translations.da: Jeg taler med min ældste datter.
translations.ja: 私は長女と話しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Verb in present indicative, 1st person singular.
Preposition introducing a complement (‘with’).
Possessive determiner (1st person singular). Masculine form used before vowel-initial feminine ‘aînée’; modifies the noun.
Feminine singular noun; complement of the preposition ‘avec’.

translations.es: Conoces a nuestra hija mayor, Clara.
translations.de: Sie kennen unsere älteste Tochter, Clara.
translations.zh-Hans: 你认识我们的长女克拉拉。
translations.yue: 你識我哋嘅長女克拉拉。
translations.ru: Вы знаете нашу старшую дочь, Клару.
translations.pt: Você conhece nossa filha mais velha, Clara.
translations.he: אתם מכירים את בתנו הבכורה, קלרה.
translations.tr: Bizim en büyük kızımız, Clara’yı tanıyorsunuz.
translations.vi: Bạn biết con gái lớn của chúng tôi, Clara.
translations.nl: U kent onze oudste dochter, Clara.
translations.uk: Ви знаєте нашу старшу доньку, Клару.
translations.hu: Ön ismeri a legidősebb lányunkat, Clarát.
translations.hi: आप हमारी बड़ी बेटी, क्लारा, को जानते हैं.
translations.pl: Znają Państwo naszą najstarszą córkę, Klarę.
translations.el: Ξέρετε τη μεγαλύτερη κόρη μας, την Κλάρα.
translations.nb: Dere kjenner vår eldste datter, Clara.
translations.id: Anda mengenal putri sulung kami, Clara.
translations.sv: Ni känner vår äldsta dotter, Clara.
translations.ro: O cunoașteți pe fiica noastră cea mare, Clara.
translations.da: I kender vores ældste datter, Clara.
translations.ja: あなたは私たちの長女クララを知っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person plural (also used for formal singular).
Verb in present indicative, 2nd person plural; transitive taking a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; modifies ‘aînée’.
Feminine singular noun; direct object of ‘connaissez’. Followed by an appositive proper noun.
Proper noun in apposition to ‘aînée’, specifying identity.
